seo.title: About | My Brand
seo.description: ClawdPress was built for brands that care about being found — by people and by AI.

data.title: Built for brands that care about being found
data.body: ClawdPress was born from frustration — heavy CMSs, bloated output, and content invisible to AI crawlers.

data.title: Why ClawdPress?
data.body: Most website builders sacrifice search performance for visual convenience. We refused that trade-off. Every ClawdPress site outputs raw, readable HTML — the kind that Google, Bing, and AI search engines can parse instantly, without executing JavaScript or fighting hydration.
